session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all results. Do not fix anything, just report.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` from the repository root and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target and report results

session.assistant:
## Fast CI Results - All Passed
**Summary:** make fast-ci completed successfully with no failures.
**Breakdown:**
- **Lint**: All checks passed! - **Format Check**: 1625 files already formatted - **Prettier Check**: All matched files use Prettier code style! - **Markdown Check**: OK (no issues reported) - **Exec Reference Check**: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date - **Type Check (ty)**: All checks passed! - **Unit Tests (erk)**: 5467 passed in 11.33s - **Tests (erk-dev)**: 136 passed in 4.28s - **Tests (erk-statusline)**: 112 passed in 0.78s - **Tests (erkbot)**: 114 passed in 1.53s - **AGENTS.md Standard**: PASSED - **CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md Pairing**: All 19 CLAUDE.md files checked with 0 violations
